mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mcp_gateway_auth (gateway_id, api_key, rate_limit, expire_time, status) VALUES (#{gatewayId}, #{apiKey}, #{rateLimit}, #{expireTime}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE mcp_gateway_auth SET gateway_id = #{gatewayId}, api_key = #{apiKey}, rate_limit = #{rateLimit}, expire_time = #{expireTime}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT count(*) FROM mcp_gateway_auth WHERE gateway_id = #{gatewayId} and status = 1
SELECT id, gateway_id, api_key, rate_limit, expire_time, status, create_time, update_time FROM mcp_gateway_auth ORDER BY id DESC
